Emily started with 25 dogs and received 4 puppies on Thursday, then added 1 stray on Friday, bringing the total to 30 before any adoptions occurred. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which means 6 dogs left the center, so the final count is now [number] dogs waiting for [home].

The rescue center is located at [address] and operates under the supervision of [manager]. Volunteers can contact the team via [phone] or [email] to learn about [program] details. Please note that the current inventory includes [breed] and other mixed dogs available for [adoption].
